content: I am building an AI agent system that runs locally with a CLI loop and optional UI.
The user is building a local AI assistant system with both CLI and UI interfaces.
I want my system to have a memory pipeline that processes chat into structured knowledge.
The user is focused on building a structured memory pipeline from raw conversation.
I rely on a regression harness as the main safety check for my system.
The user uses regression testing as the primary stability mechanism.
I want my system to stay test-protected and predictable.
The user prioritizes deterministic behavior and test protection.
I am building this system step by step and want to avoid breaking it as it grows.
The user prefers incremental, controlled system evolution.
I want my system to be lean but scalable into a larger architecture.
The user aims for a minimal system that can evolve into a more complex architecture.
